content.en:
"I already have the super god-level Origin Earth Yuan talent, and with the Origin Well, which is an innate origin thing, I can go and cultivate the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power now. I haven't reached the Heavenly Mandate realm of cultivation, and I can't practice into a real Chaos Divine Power, but I can practice into a prototype of a Chaos Divine Power, and its power is far beyond that of ordinary Great Divine Powers, and even enough to be comparable to the power of the first few Great Divine Powers of the Three Thousand Great Divine Powers. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It is conceivable that after he has practiced the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power, his strength will inevitably skyrocket, and he can definitely easily reach the strength of a five-star peak god general, and he can even face a six-star god general without dying.

Coupled with the Great Immortal Technique and the speed of the Constant Light Divine Power, he could even kill a six-star early stage god general.

However, Ye Tian did not immediately cultivate the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Ability, because it would take a lot of time to cultivate this Divine Ability.

Finally came to this secret world, naturally he had to seize the opportunity, but he couldn't waste time, otherwise if he went to find the treasure again, maybe there wouldn't be many resources left.

Anyway, with his speed, few of the six-star gods could surpass him.

Swish!

Ye Tian left the ground, came to the ground, and began to look for resources.

Not long after the birth of this secret world, the air was filled with innate vitality and a faint chaotic vitality, which was very rich, and it was full of elixirs, spiritual roots and precious ores.

Moreover, many fierce beasts were born here, but most of them were not very strong, and the strongest was only comparable to the Earth Lord, after all, it was difficult for such a big world to breed fierce beasts comparable to God Generals and Heavenly Monarchs at the beginning.

Therefore, in such a secret world, fierce beasts and other native creatures are definitely not a threat, the biggest threat is other god generals.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find a lot of rare elixirs and spirit plants, all of which were included in the small universe in his body.

Half a month later.

Ye Tian was collecting resources in an area, and suddenly the breath of a divine general was found in the induction of the life heavenly pupil, and the aura was very powerful, and the strength was estimated to be at the level of a five-star peak divine general, which was very close to a six-star divine general.

Ye Tian didn't want to conflict with the other party, so he went in the other direction.

However, the other party chased after him.

No matter how Ye Tian changed direction, this person seemed to be chasing him closely.

"The other party must also have the Heavenly Pupil of Life!"

Ye Tian realized.

Seventh-order life has a life pupil, and there are almost no gods in the universe who have a seventh-order life level, but it is very common in chaos, not to mention the seventh-order life level gods, even if it is an eighth-order life level god general.

In other words, it was difficult for Ye Tian to get rid of the other party.

Just when the five-star peak god general was still relatively far away from Ye Tian, a cold killing machine came.

Tear and pull!

A sword tore through the void to kill, this was the full force of the five-star peak god general, and the speed was extremely fast, almost comparable to the speed of the six-star early stage god general.

Moreover, the sword seemed to lock on to him, and even if he had the talent of time and space, it would be difficult to move away.

"Great Immortal Technique!"

Ye Tian used this great defensive power.

Burst!

The lore sword stabbed at Ye Tian's body, piercing through all kinds of defensive talents and defense methods one by one, and bombarding the last layer of defense formed by the Great Immortal Technique.

Boom!!

Ye Tian's body was knocked away, crashing through the giant mountains, and it was just relaxed, and there was nothing big about it.

Based on his figure, Ye Tian stared at a black-armored young man not far away, the other party was holding a Chaos Spirit Treasure long sword, which should be a superb Chaos Spirit Treasure and was worth a lot of money.

"Great Immortal Technique, how is it possible, how can you practice the Great Immortal Technique!!!"

The black-armored young man was stunned, looking incredulous.

This is the Great Immortal Technique, which ranks 26th among the three thousand great divine powers in Chaos, and its cultivation conditions are extremely harsh, let alone him, even among the divine generals of his forces, no one has practiced this great divine power.

The Great Immortal Technique is one of the strongest life-preserving powers!

The black-armored youth was shocked, and Ye Tian was also very surprised.

Under the induction of his Life Heavenly Pupil, he didn't find the existence of the black-armored youth, otherwise he wouldn't have been attacked by the black-armored youth, if it weren't for the Great Immortal Technique, he would have been hit hard just now, and even killed by a single blow.

The black-armored youth is very strong, and he is infinitely close to the existence of a six-star god general, although it is nothing in the big universe, but it is much more powerful than him.

"You can actually block the vitality and not even sense the life pupil, how did you do it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Eh, you don't even know this, could it be that you are a native creature of the Great Universe?" said the black-armored young man with a smile.

He seemed to be waiting for something, so he didn't take action immediately, but explained: "The ability of the Life Pupil is nothing in the chaos, many treasures and means can shield the Life Pupil, and I have practiced a fragment of the Great Divine Power of Life, although it is far inferior to the real Great Divine Power of Life, but the ability to shield your Heavenly Pupil of Life is very simple." I don't want to kill you, you just need to take out the inheritance jade slip of the Great Immortal Technique, as well as the corresponding innate origin things. And you can practice the Great Immortal Technique, I'm afraid there is an Arcana that can fuse the talent of defense and destruction, and that Arcana will also be taken out. "

"I'm all of them, but I don't have them on me. Besides, even if there is, why should I give it to you?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"Run out?"

The black-armored young man did not doubt it, after all, it would be good to have one of such treasures, it was very normal for Ye Tian to have it, otherwise the Great Immortal Technique would not be so difficult to cultivate.

But.

The black-armored young man laughed: "I'm sorry, I just delayed time, my companion has already come, you can't run!"

Wow!

The five-star peak god in the distance moved over in an instant, and surrounded Ye Tian with the black-armored youth, locking Ye Tian with the qi machine and preventing Ye Tian from leaving.

In the face of this situation, the general space great divine power could not let Ye Tian leave, unless he could practice the space great divine power that was close to the ranking of the three thousand great divine powers, he could easily tear the space and leave.

"Kill him!"

The two five-star peak gods said in a low voice.

Killing people and grabbing treasures, the two of them have done a lot of things.

They didn't dare to deal with the six-star god generals, they only dared to target some lone five-star god generals, one of them attracted people on the bright side, and the other assassinated them secretly.

Originally, the plan was very good, but I didn't expect Ye Tian to have the Great Immortal Technique, and the assassination was unsuccessful.

However, they did not allow Ye Tian to leave.

Rumble!!!

The two five-star peak gods came to kill, but Ye Tian was not afraid at all, the Great Immortal Technique was opened, and the constant light divine power was also displayed, and he launched an attack on the two of them at an extremely fast speed.

One after another, the sword light tore through the void, Ye Tian's figure was extremely fast under the blessing of the constant light supernatural power, and the knife and knife showed a real skill, and the power of the technique was close to the Dao, making any of Ye Tian's moves comparable to a unique move.

Occasionally, Ye Tian also burst out with the strongest moves, the Hunyuan Slash and the Heavenly Sword Sixth Type Endless Sword Realm, turning this area into the Endless Sword Realm, and the Endless Sword Qi exploded, and the power was extremely terrifying.

But Ye Tian's unique tricks were difficult to help these two five-star peak generals, after all, the difference in strength was there.

However, these two five-star peak gods couldn't help Ye Tian, because the speed couldn't keep up!

Under such a fight, the battle between the two sides consumed a lot.

One day!

Two days!

Three days!

With every breath, the two sides clashed countless times, and before they knew it, the two five-star peak gods would consume most of it, but Ye Tian did not consume much, because his foundation was too deep, and the small universe in his body continued to provide abilities.

In comparison, these two five-star peak god generals have a little worse lasting combat ability, but during the battle, they have managed to replenish their divine power and restore their strength.

Gradually, Ye Tian began to suppress these two five-star peak god generals.

However, in order to prevent them from escaping, Ye Tian deliberately pretended to be in a state of exhaustion, as if he was casting a forbidden technique.

"Hold on, he's dying!"

The two five-star peak gods said excitedly.

In their opinion, Ye Tian is so powerful, he has cultivated many great magical powers, and his net worth must be very rich, if he kills Ye Tian, he will make a lot of money.

Over time, they found that they were always just a little short of being able to kill Ye Tian with heavy damage.

But at one point, they were horrified to find themselves in a terrible state.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian erupted with a terrifying momentum, and the whole person seemed to be at his peak.

"It's not good, run away!"

The black-armored youth said in fear.

At this moment, a chaotic aura appeared, trapping another five-star peak god general in it at once, if that person was at the peak, he could naturally easily shatter this aura, but now it was difficult to do so.

This is another of Ye Tian's tricks, the sixth type of the Hunyuan system, which is a move that specializes in suppressing enemies and trapped people.

"Die!"

Ye Tian used all his strength to cast the Hunyuan Slash and the Great Destruction Technique, and bombarded this person's head, shattering the opponent's head, annihilating the opponent's soul, and completely killing him.

Then, Ye Tian began to hunt down the black-armored young man again.

After a half-hour pursuit, Ye Tian finally killed him on a river.

After killing the two of them, Ye Tian hurriedly left this area, and then found a place to hide at random.
